case_title: PALM TRAVEL SERVICES VS. FAIKA H. HAMODA

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF PALM TRAVEL SERVICES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,872.00 FILED BY PALM TRAVEL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HAMODA, FAIKA H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALM TRAVEL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HAMODA, FAIKA H.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-08-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION PROGRAM AND REACHED AN AGREEMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MAR-08-17 HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF PALM TRAVEL SERVICES IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KELLI ALANISI, OWNER AND MANAGER. DEFENDANT FAIKA H. HAMODA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-30-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMODA, FAIKA H.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALM TRAVEL SERVICES
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION ON FEB-16-17. PER THE SIGNED MENDIATION AGREEMENT PARTIES AGREED THAT IF NEITHER PARTY RETURNS TO COURT FOR THE FINAL PROGRESS REPORT HEARING THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF PALM TRAVEL SERVICES OR DEFENDANT FAIKA HAMONDA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
